fields.name: Bench Press
fields.description: Compound chest exercise. Lie on bench, lower bar to mid-chest, press up.

fields.name: Incline Bench Press
fields.description: Targets upper chest. Bench at 30-45° incline.

fields.name: Dumbbell Bench Press
fields.description: Greater range of motion than barbell variant.

fields.name: Dumbbell Fly
fields.description: Isolation exercise for the chest. Slight bend in elbows.

fields.name: Push-up
fields.description: Foundational bodyweight pressing movement.

fields.name: Cable Crossover
fields.description: Constant tension on the chest through full range.

fields.name: Dips
fields.description: Lean forward to emphasize chest. Vertical torso emphasizes triceps.

fields.name: Deadlift
fields.description: King of compound lifts. Hinges from hips, lifts bar from floor.

fields.name: Pull-up
fields.description: Overhand grip. Pull chest to bar.

fields.name: Chin-up
fields.description: Underhand grip. Greater bicep involvement than pull-ups.

fields.name: Bent-over Row
fields.description: Hinge at hips, pull bar to lower chest/upper abdomen.

fields.name: Dumbbell Row
fields.description: One arm at a time, supported on bench.

fields.name: Lat Pulldown
fields.description: Pull bar to upper chest. Good pull-up alternative.

fields.name: Seated Cable Row
fields.description: Pull handle to abdomen, squeeze shoulder blades.

fields.name: T-Bar Row
fields.description: Heavy rowing variation with chest support optional.

fields.name: Face Pull
fields.description: Pull rope to face, external rotation. Rear delts and rotator cuff.

fields.name: Squat
fields.description: Bar on traps, descend until thighs parallel or below.

fields.name: Front Squat
fields.description: Bar racked on front delts. More quad emphasis, upright torso.

fields.name: Romanian Deadlift
fields.description: Hinge at hips, slight knee bend. Hamstrings and glutes.

fields.name: Leg Press
fields.description: Machine-based compound leg movement.

fields.name: Leg Curl
fields.description: Hamstring isolation. Lying or seated.

fields.name: Leg Extension
fields.description: Quad isolation.

fields.name: Walking Lunge
fields.description: Step forward, descend until back knee near floor, alternate legs.

fields.name: Bulgarian Split Squat
fields.description: Rear foot elevated. Brutal but effective unilateral leg builder.

fields.name: Calf Raise
fields.description: Pause at top and bottom for full calf development.

fields.name: Hip Thrust
fields.description: Upper back on bench, drive hips up. Premier glute exercise.

fields.name: Overhead Press
fields.description: Standing barbell press from shoulders to overhead.

fields.name: Seated Dumbbell Press
fields.description: Less stabilization needed than standing. Good for hypertrophy.

fields.name: Lateral Raise
fields.description: Side delts isolation. Slight lean forward, controlled.

fields.name: Front Raise
fields.description: Front delts isolation. Often unnecessary if pressing volume is adequate.

fields.name: Rear Delt Fly
fields.description: Bent over, raise dumbbells out to sides. Rear delts.

fields.name: Arnold Press
fields.description: Press with rotation. Hits all three deltoid heads.

fields.name: Upright Row
fields.description: Pull bar to upper chest along the body. Wider grip is shoulder-friendly.

fields.name: Barbell Curl
fields.description: Classic biceps mass builder.

fields.name: Dumbbell Curl
fields.description: Allows supination through movement. Alternating or simultaneous.

fields.name: Hammer Curl
fields.description: Neutral grip. Brachialis and forearm emphasis.

fields.name: Preacher Curl
fields.description: Arms supported on pad. Strict biceps isolation.

fields.name: Tricep Dip
fields.description: Vertical torso for triceps emphasis.

fields.name: Tricep Pushdown
fields.description: Rope or bar attachment. Lock elbows at sides.

fields.name: Skull Crusher
fields.description: Lying triceps extension. EZ-bar gentler on wrists.

fields.name: Overhead Tricep Extension
fields.description: Stretches long head of triceps. Hold one dumbbell overhead with both hands.

fields.name: Close-Grip Bench Press
fields.description: Hands shoulder-width apart. Heavy triceps builder.

fields.name: Plank
fields.description: Forearms on floor, body straight. Hold for time.

fields.name: Side Plank
fields.description: Lateral core. Stack feet, hips up.

fields.name: Hanging Leg Raise
fields.description: Hang from bar, raise straight legs to horizontal or higher.

fields.name: Cable Crunch
fields.description: Kneeling, rope to face, crunch towards floor.

fields.name: Russian Twist
fields.description: Seated, lean back, rotate side to side. Add weight for resistance.

fields.name: Ab Wheel Rollout
fields.description: From knees: roll out, return. Deceptively brutal.

fields.name: Burpee
fields.description: Squat, kick to plank, push-up, jump. Cardio and conditioning.

fields.name: Kettlebell Swing
fields.description: Hip hinge, swing to chest height. Posterior chain power.

fields.name: Clean and Press
fields.description: Floor to overhead in one or two movements.

fields.name: Thruster
fields.description: Front squat into overhead press.

fields.name: Turkish Get-up
fields.description: Lying to standing while supporting weight overhead. Slow, deliberate.
